name: Download Messages
messages: Share KteePee with your friends in the INFO tab

KteePee, offline, still works, go on, try it!
Festival Tip: Go on flight mode, no signal anyway!
Festival Tip: Be kind to the volunteers, they're amazing!
Festival Tip: Rehydrate often, try and get some shade in
Festival Tip: Leave early, you'll make many friends on the way
Festival Tip: Eat what you like not what you need!
Festival Tip: Earplugs, aeroplanes, no brainer!
Festival Tip: Dist'X has everything to buy you could need
Festival Tip: Dist'X has everything to buy you could need
Festival Tip: Get your merch in early, stuff sells out fast!
Festival Tip: Take a photo of your camp so help recognise it
Festival Tip: KteePee is great, could've just got a neon flag though?
Festival Tip — Charge a power bank before your phone, future you will thank you
Festival Tip — Eat one real meal a day, your stomach will negotiate peace
Festival Tip — Wet wipes are currency, guard them
Festival Tip — Don’t wait for the toilet queue to shrink, it never does
Festival Tip — Bring bin bags, they’re rain covers, seat mats and laundry baskets
Festival Tip — Label your water bottle, everyone has the same one
Festival Tip — Stretch in the morning, your legs will survive the arena
Festival Tip — Don’t camp next to footpaths unless you enjoy 4am traffic
Festival Tip — Bring a spare pair of socks, it’s basically a life reset
Festival Tip — If you lose your mates, your new ones are right next to you!
Festival Tip — Don’t rely on your voice to find friends, rely on landmarks
Festival Tip — Keep your valuables in your sleeping bag at night
Festival Tip — Bring a tiny torch, your phone torch will betray you
Festival Tip — Don’t wear your favourite shoes, the mud will win
Festival Tip — If you’re cold at night, put tomorrow’s clothes in your sleeping bag
Festival Tip — Don’t camp near the toilets unless you enjoy regret
Festival Tip — Start the day with sunscreen, not regrets
Festival Tip — Compliment someone’s outfit, it’ll make both your days
Festival Tip — Don’t trust the weather app, trust the clouds
Festival Tip — Dance like no one’s filming because signal won’t upload it anyway
Festival Tip — Share your snacks, it’s the fastest way to make friends
Festival Tip — If you hear “one more song”, hydrate immediately
Festival Tip — Camp on a slope if you enjoy rollin' rollin' rollin'
Festival Tip — A hoodie at night is worth its weight in gold
Festival Tip — If you’re lost, follow the laughter, not the map
Festival Tip — Compliment the security team, they deal with everything
Festival Tip — Bring a tiny first‑aid kit, future‑you will be proud
Festival Tip — Eat fruit at least once just to confuse your body
Festival Tip — If your mate disappears, check the merch tent first
Festival Tip — Take a moment to look around, these are the memories
Festival Tip — It's okay to film, but watch the show not the screen
Festival Tip — Don’t wear brand‑new boots, they will betray you
Festival Tip — If someone looks lost, help them — festival karma is real
Festival Tip — Keep a tiny stash of dry socks, they’re emotional support
Please help anyone you see in need, karma is real
Struggling? Sit, breathe. Take 5. Its a long week, don't rush it
